_doc: Single source of truth for upstream URLs + sha256 pins. Read by scripts/fetch-sources.sh.

gptk_redist._doc: Apple GPTK Redistributables (D3DMetal.framework + libd3dshared.dylib + License.rtf). Re-distributed by calimocho per Apple GPTK SLA §2A(iii) + §2C — see ADR-0011 and docs/ADR/0005-bundle-gptk-d3dmetal.md.
